title: DeviceIdentity
description: Device identity and trust profile for a SourceOS local-first workstation or operator device. Governs admission, attestation, capability assignment, and local data plane access.

id.description: Stable device identity URN. Must be unique per device.

deviceName.description: Human-readable device name. Must not include raw network addresses or PII.

trustProfile.description: Device trust posture evaluated at registration or last attestation.

trustLevel.description: untrusted = not admitted; provisional = limited policy scope; trusted = full local data plane; anchor = quorum-eligible trust root.

enrollmentRef.description: EnrollmentProfile URN governing this device's admission.

attestationRefs.description: AttestationEvidence URNs supporting the current trust level.

trustExpiresAt.description: Optional expiry for time-bounded trust grants.

trustRevocationRef.description: RevocationEntry URN if trust has been revoked.

capabilityProfileRef.description: WorkspaceCapabilityProfile URN describing surfaces available on this device.

encryptionProfileRef.description: LocalEncryptionProfile URN for this device's local data encryption posture.

ownerRef.description: Subject or org authority reference for device ownership.
